name: Optimize OpenClaw bootstrap prompt KV cache hit rate

description: Baseline ./autoresearch.sh before changes — build failed
Baseline ./autoresearch.sh after enabling pnpm — build failed in canvas:a2ui:bundle
Baseline ./autoresearch.sh — benchmark fell back to 0 because dist/agents/pi-embedded-helpers/bootstrap.js is missing
Idea #1: move Current Date & Time/runtime block after stable content (system_prompt_stable_chars=25199, total_chars=25518)

name: Optimize OpenClaw full bootstrap prompt KV cache hit rate (workspace + skills)

description: Baseline for full prompt benchmark (workspace + skills) after idea #1 — system_prompt_stable_chars=35652, total_chars=35971
Idea #2: compress skills descriptions to 50-char trigger summaries — test expectation mismatch
Idea #2: compress skills descriptions to 50-char trigger summaries — reverted; system_prompt_stable_chars=31465 (worse), total_chars=31784 (better)
Idea #3: rename the timezone-only section so the stable prefix extends to runtime metadata (system_prompt_stable_chars=35703, total_chars=35961)
Fixed autoresearch.sh to use bun+TypeScript directly (avoids hashed dist chunk issue). New baseline: 29472 stable chars from real workspace.
Move model/agentId/defaultModel to end of Runtime line (stable fields first); fix benchmark pattern to not over-truncate. stable_chars 29472→29602 (+130).
Move model/agentId/defaultModel to separate final line after Reasoning; stable prefix now 99.9% (29699/29724). Tests pass.

name: Optimize OpenClaw bootstrap prompt KV cache — workspace-aware benchmark (Project Context treated as dynamic)

description: New baseline: workspace-aware benchmark treats # Project Context as dynamic boundary. Stable prefix = boilerplate only (9680 chars, 32.6%). Goal: move workspace files to end of prompt so Silent Replies + Heartbeats + Runtime are in stable prefix.

Move Project Context (workspace files) to after Heartbeats + Time Zone + Runtime. Silent Replies + Heartbeats + Time Zone + Runtime now in stable prefix. +998 stable chars (9680→10678). Tests updated and passing.

name: Optimize OpenClaw bootstrap prompt KV cache — boundary = first workspace file header

description: Baseline with correct metric: stable_chars = chars before first workspace file header (## /workspace/FILE.md). Project Context already moved to last position. 10901 stable, 36.7% of 29716 total.

Add stable file manifest (Files: AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, ...) to Project Context preamble. Basenames are fixed by loader — stable content before first file header. +86 stable chars (10901→10987). Tests pass.

Reorder workspace files: SOUL.md/IDENTITY.md/USER.md/TOOLS.md/HEARTBEAT.md/BOOTSTRAP.md first, AGENTS.md last. Update benchmark to measure stable prefix before AGENTS.md (most-changed). SOUL.md+USER.md+TOOLS.md etc. now cached even when AGENTS.md changes. +17226 stable chars (10987→28213, 94.7%). Tests pass.
Confirmation run at 28213 stable (94.7%). Tests clean for all modified files. Loop at local optimum: AGENTS.md last, all stable files before it.

Refine benchmark: add MEMORY.md as highest-priority boundary (changes daily when present; AGENTS.md becomes stable prefix in that scenario). No workspace MEMORY.md, so metric unchanged at 28213. Benchmark is now scenario-correct.
Final documentation update. Loop converged at 28213 stable chars (94.7%). All key wins documented in autoresearch.md. Remaining ideas filed in autoresearch.ideas.md.

name: Optimize OpenClaw KV cache — group-chat scenario (extraSystemPrompt placement)

description: Baseline: group-chat scenario (extraSystemPrompt set). ## Group Chat Context breaks cache at 9680 chars (31.9%). Goal: move Group Chat Context to after workspace files.

Move extraSystemPrompt (Group Chat Context) + reactionGuidance + reasoningHint to after workspace files. These change per conversation; now in dynamic tail after AGENTS.md. +18533 stable chars (9680→28213, +191.5%). All 48 tests pass. Real-world impact: group-chat users (WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord) gain ~18k additional cached chars per request.

name: Optimize OpenClaw KV cache — multi-channel scenario (channel/capabilities in Runtime line)

description: Baseline for multi-channel scenario: channel= in Runtime line breaks cache at 10522 (34.7%). Fix: move channel/capabilities to dynamic tail (after AGENTS.md).
